Publication_title: International bonds XS3353982112 and XS3353982385 of Kazakhstan Temir Zholy included in KASE official list
Why_relevant: Official exchange notice gives issuer, two ISINs, amount, coupon, maturity and effective date.
Likely_classification: deal; preserve two issue identities in one coordinated lifecycle
Approval_review_expectation: approved expected with issue documents; otherwise review
False_positive_concerns: The live sample is addressable through the date-filtered index; listing date is not necessarily settlement date and the two ISINs must remain distinct.

Publication_title: Three issues of KMF Bank bonds included in KASE official list
Why_relevant: Official exchange notice provides three registration numbers, terms and programme linkage.
Likely_classification: deal; three security identities under one programme
False_positive_concerns: Programme amount is not one placed deal; placement completion requires later evidence.

Publication_title: Qazaqstan Investment Corporation bonds KZ2C00018182 included in private placement market

False_positive_concerns: Private-placement listing does not prove the full USD 500m was placed.

False_positive_concerns: A registered closed subscription may be an internal capitalization rather than market ECM.
